title: Jet Zero Australia Secures Record Government Investment for Project Ulysses
content: Jet Zero Australia has today welcomed Commonwealth and Queensland Government grant support worth $14 million to progress Project Ulysses, the companyâ€™s flagship Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) project in Townsville. The jointly announced government funding represents $9 million of funding from the Australian Renewable Energy Agency (ARENA) as part of ARENAâ€™s Advancing Renewables Program, and $5 million funding from the Queensland Government through the Queensland New-Industry Development Strategy (QNIDS) grow local production capabilities and establish SAF value chains in Queensland.
author: Analysts Account
